title: Constitutional amendment ballot language
doc_html:
Joint Rule No. 5.  Constitutional amendment ballot language

All ballot language for constitutional amendments shall be drafted in clear, concise, and unbiased  language and be phrased in the form of a question.  The ballot language shall begin with the phrase "Do you support an amendment to".

HCR 4, 2011, eff. July 1, 2011.
